name: tower
_comment: Stonecutters single-shaft pylon, 298 m. Cantilever mode 1, T=1.0 s near 1:1 resonance with C_short (T1=0.73 s, slightly off to avoid divergence). amp=0.02 m (2 cm tip) ensures visible motion without excessive cable response. Cable T1 range: 0.73-3.63 s. For stronger demo of C_mid 1:1 use T=2.30s + smaller amp.
